articles.title: 'Mass invasion of migrants': Vance calls for 'righteous anger' over UK teen's stabbing by Sikh man
articles.description: The US Vice President went on to argue that the circumstances surrounding the case reflected broader societal failures and urged what he called "righteous anger" in response. Nowak was stabbed by 23-year-old Vickrum Digwa, who was convicted of murder this week and sentenced to life imprisonment with a minimum term of 21 years.

articles.title: 'Sanctions threat would boomerang': Putin hails India's stance against foreign diktats
articles.description: The Russian president said Kremlin's cooperation with India "is not subject to the political environment" and that Moscow would stand "true to commitments given to our partners, especially partners like India". "Our cooperation with India, just like with all other partners of ours, is not subject to the political environment. We can't be dictated to not deliver that to India. Nobody can dictate to us and nobody would even try to do that... We will always stand true to commitments given to our partners, especially partners like India," he further said.

articles.title: Bride-to-be, stabbed 34 times, chilling CCTV: How Mohali office turned into scene of horror
articles.description: A shocking incident in Mohali saw a 30-year-old woman, Dimple, brutally stabbed to death by a colleague just days before her wedding.  The attack, captured on CCTV, occurred at her office desk. The assailant, Harvinder Mann, then attempted suicide and is in critical condition.  Investigations suggest a rejected reconciliation attempt led to the tragic event.

articles.title: Meta's highest-paid employee’s 'health message' to Anthropic, OpenAI & Google
articles.description: Meta's top AI executive, Alexandr Wang, revealed the company's strategy to challenge rivals like OpenAI and Google by focusing on health-related AI capabilities. While acknowledging current models aren't top-tier, Wang highlighted Meta's commitment to advancing AI for health applications, aiming to integrate these features into popular platforms like Facebook and Instagram.

articles.title: Sneako says he’s getting married, but there’s more to the story behind viral clip
articles.description: Internet sensation Sneako sparked widespread speculation with a viral clip announcing his marriage. However, the streamer later clarified in the same video that it was a deliberate joke, highlighting how edited clips can mislead audiences. This revelation left many fans confused, as the initial announcement was shared without full context.

articles.title: KSI’s departure from Sidemen triggers fresh debate after group releases clarifying statement
articles.description: The Sidemen have released a statement following KSI’s departure from the group. While they said they respect his decision, they revealed that the announcement came before a mutual plan had been agreed upon. The group hoped to organize a proper farewell but said events unfolded differently. Despite the change, the remaining members confirmed they will continue creating content together.

articles.title: Twitch star Nmplol breaks silence on divorce settlement with ex-wife Malena Tudi
articles.description: Twitch streamer Nmplol has disclosed details of his divorce settlement with ex-wife Malena Tudi. The court finalized their marriage under a no-fault insupportability ruling, with most assets split 50/50, though Malena received a larger share of Starforge Systems. Nmplol also revealed incurring over $400,000 in legal fees and expressed relief that the lengthy process is finally over.

articles.title: $1.3 trillion erased from Wall Street: Here's what slowed down AI rally
articles.description: Tech stocks, particularly semiconductors, experienced a significant downturn Friday, driven by investor caution over AI valuations and robust US jobs data. The PHLX Semiconductor Index saw its steepest drop since March 2020, erasing billions in market value. This retreat follows a period of record highs, with strong employment figures fueling concerns about interest rate cuts.

articles.title: Pocket-friendly packets: Why Indians are swapping big snack packs for smaller ones
articles.description: Consumers are increasingly opting for smaller pack sizes of everyday goods, from edible oils to soaps, as rising costs strain monthly budgets. This shift, driven by economic stress and geopolitical factors, is leading FMCG companies to reduce grammage in popular low-priced packs to maintain affordability and protect profit margins.

articles.title: GDP rose 7.7% in FY26, 7.8% in Q4; RBI trims this year's projection to 6.6%
articles.description: India's economy surged by 7.8% in the Jan-March quarter, driven by strong investment, consistent farm output, and expansion in construction and tertiary sectors. This robust demand offset potential negative impacts from West Asian conflicts. The government remains committed to driving economic momentum through decisive policy measures.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: Karnataka Police Constable Recruitment 2026: Applications open for 3,395 posts; check eligibility, selection process and how to apply
articles.description: Karnataka Police has announced recruitment for 3,395 Constable (Civil) positions, with applications opening June 5, 2026. Eligibility requires PUC/Class 12, with age limits varying by category. The selection involves a written test, physical standards, and medical examination. Successful candidates will undergo training and receive a pay scale of Rs 37,500-Rs 76,100.

articles.title: TS Inter Supplementary Results 2026 expected soon: Check likely dates, how to download
articles.description: Telangana Intermediate supplementary exam results for 1st and 2nd year students are expected between June 10-16, 2026. Following the completion of evaluations, the TGBIE will soon release scores for both general and vocational streams. Students can check their provisional marks online after an 11 am press conference. The supplementary exams were held for students seeking to improve or clear subjects.

articles.title: UP Police SI Admit Card 2026 released at uppbpb.gov.in: Check link and steps to download
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh Police Sub-Inspector candidates can now download their admit cards for Document Verification and Physical Standard Test. Successful candidates from the March 2026 written exam can access their hall tickets on the UPPRPB website. The DV and PST are scheduled for June 15-16, 2026, across the state, filling over 4,500 vacancies.

articles.title: Big relief for JEE aspirants: IIT Roorkee opens counselling route for candidates below 75% marks in CBSE Class 12
articles.description: IIT Roorkee has said that students who do not meet the minimum Class 12 marks criteria can still participate in the ongoing JEE Advanced counselling process. However, final admission will depend on meeting the required marks and document verification. The institute has also asked candidates to submit updated scorecards by July 15. The update comes amid concerns around CBSE’s marking system and reported discrepancies in Class 12 answer sheets.

The update comes amid concerns around CBSE’s marking system and reported discrepancies in Class 12 answer sheets.

articles.title: 'Bethlehem Kudumba Unit': Film gets release date
articles.description: Nivin Pauly and Mamitha Baiju's 'Bethlehem Kudumba Unit' is set for an Onam release, aiming for a box office advantage. The first look poster has generated excitement, with fans praising the pairing. Directed by Girish A.D., the film also features a strong supporting cast. Nivin Pauly is also slated to play the antagonist in Lokesh Kanagaraj's LCU film, Benz.

articles.title: Varun Dhawan calls Farah Khan the ‘highest paid YouTuber’
articles.description: Varun Dhawan playfully dubbed Farah Khan the 'highest-earning YouTuber' after she gifted luxury watches and diamond pendants to the cast of 'Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai'. Khan's popular vlogging channel, featuring cooking and celebrity guests, boasts millions of subscribers, highlighting her significant online success beyond filmmaking.

articles.title: Angelina celebrates 51st b'day kids; attends Knox's graduation- PICS
articles.description: Angelina Jolie celebrated her 51st birthday with her children in Los Angeles, coinciding with son Knox's graduation. The actress was seen with Knox and Pax, as reports indicate several of her children are now opting to use only 'Jolie' in their surnames, distancing themselves from father Brad Pitt amidst ongoing legal disputes.

articles.title: 'Game of Thrones' star Kit Harington reveals rehab decision
articles.description: Global star Kit Harington, famed for Jon Snow, has revealed a personal battle during 'Game of Thrones' final season. He checked into rehab for six weeks, prioritizing sobriety and mental clarity over the show's extensive press tour. This difficult decision led to a year-long break from acting, allowing him to reassess his life and career.
